title: The Turbostar Class 168/170/171/172 DMU Pack [MTR4]
description: Adds a wide-range of liveries and variants for the Bombardier Turbostar & Clubman family of DMUs, for Minecraft Transit Railway!
body:
![Class 172/2  in London Midland livery and a Class 170/5 in West Midlands Railway livery](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fdbb35159db76417ce01adc0748426e9717c41a1.png)
# The Turbostar Pack

**~~14~~ 22 Train Operating Companies, ~~35~~ 71 Liveries & Variations, across Classes 168, 170, 171 & 172 for Minecraft Transit Railway 4.0.0 and above!**

Including sounds kindly made by Navi, and the following stock:

### Class 168
- Class 168/0 Chiltern Railways Blue, Original (V1.5)
- Class 168/0 Chiltern Railways Blue
- Class 168/0 Chiltern Railways Mainline
- Class 168/0 Chiltern Railways Revised (Refurb)
- Class 168/1 Chiltern Railways Blue
- Class 168/1 Chiltern Railways Mainline
- Class 168/1 Chiltern Railways Revised (Refurb)
- Class 168/2 Chiltern Railways Blue
- Class 168/2 Chiltern Railways Mainline
- Class 168/2 Chiltern Railways Revised (Refurb)

### Class 170
- Class 170 CrossCountry Trains
- Class 170 CrossCountry Trains Pride
- Class 170 CrossCountry Trains Refurbished (V1.2)
- Class 170 East Midlands Railway, refurbished interior
- Class 170 East Midlands Railway, ex ScotRail interior
- Class 170 East Midlands Railway, ex Southern interior (V1.4)
- Class 170 East Midlands Railway, ex West Midlands Railway/London Midland interior
- Class 170 East Midlands Railway, ex Transport For Wales/GreaterAnglia interior
- Class 170 East Midlands Railway, CrossCountry Interim (hire-in 170638)
- Class 170 East Midlands Railway, Transport For Wales/GreaterAnglia Interim
- Class 170 East Midlands Railway, Southern Interim
- Class 170 London Midland
- Class 170 West Midlands Railway
- Class 170 First TransPennine Express
- Class 170 TransPennine Express
- Class 170 ONE Anglia
- Class 170 ONE Anglia Dark Blue (V1.5)
- Class 170 National Express East Anglia ex-Anglia Railways (V1.1)
- Class 170 National Express East Anglia ex-ONE (V1.5)
- Class 170 Abellio GreaterAnglia ex-Anglia Railways (V1.1)
- Class 170 Anglia Railways (V1.1)
- Class 170 Anglia Railways Revised (V1.1)
- Class 170 Abellio GreaterAnglia
- Class 170 GreaterAnglia (post-2018 refurbishment)
- Class 170 Northern
- Class 170 Northern, DFTO "NORTHERN" logo (V1.4)
- Class 170 First ScotRail Large & Small HL (V1.1)
- Class 170 ScotRail (small & large headlight options)
- Class 170 ScotRail, 170425 "Join the ghost train" logos (V1.4)
- Class 170 Scotrail, Saltire Debranded (V1.5)
- Class 170 Scotrail, Plain Blue (V1.5)
- Class 170 Central Trains (Best Impressions Green) (V1.1)
- Class 170 Central Trains (Midland Mainline) (V1.1)
- Class 170 Central Trains (Porterbrook) (V1.1)
- Class 170 CrossCountry ex Central (Green) (V1.1)
- Class 170 CrossCountry ex Central (Midland Mainline) (V1.1)
- Class 170 CrossCountry ex Central (Porterbrook) (V1.1)
- Class 170 HullTrains (V1.1)
- Class 170 Midland Mainline (V1.1)
- Class 170 QJump (V1.1)
- Class 170 South West Trains (V1.1)
- Class 170 South West Trains (170392 South Central add-on order) (V1.1)
- Class 170 SPT Carmine and Cream (V1.1)
- Class 170 SPT Rail Carmine + Cream & Blue (V1.1)
- Class 170 Transport For Wales (V1.1)
- Class 170 West Midlands Railway (London Midland Interim) (V1.3)
- Class 170 Porterbrook Spot-Hire (170399) (V1.5)

### Class 171
- Southern (small & large headlight options)
- Southern Old Logo (small & large headlight options) (V1.3)

### Class 172
- Class 172/0 London Overground
- Class 172/0 West Midlands Railway
- Class 172/1 Chiltern Railways
- Class 172/1 West Midlands Railway Chiltern Railways interim (V1.1)
- Class 172/1 West Midlands Railway (Chiltern Railways interior) (V1.1)
- Class 172/2 London Midland
- Class 172/2 West Midlands Railway
- Class 172/2 West Midlands Railway (London Midland Interim) (V1.3)
  
![Class 170/6 LondonMidland and Southern Class 171 Turbostar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/366240b43f93afa12a4c159d4f221c8037e3ac81.png)
![Class 172/0 Chiltern Railways](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/793b3c0a9fab8955df90dac2d014cec0ffb2ed56.png)
![First TransPennine Express Class 170/3 stopped at a platform](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ea6125ab8cee80a71f16838f309cbf4175e326f1.png)
